nasb.text: So David blessed the Lord in the sight of all the assembly; and David said, “Blessed are You, O Lord God of Israel our father, forever and ever.

esv.text: Therefore David blessed the Lord in the presence of all the assembly. And David said: “Blessed are you, O Lord, the God of Israel our father, forever and ever.

cnv.text: 所以大衛在全體會眾面前稱頌耶和華，說：“耶和華我們的祖先以色列的　神，是應當稱頌的，從亙古直到永遠。

ccb.text: 大卫在会众面前颂赞耶和华，说：“我们先祖以色列的上帝耶和华啊，你永永远远当受颂赞！
